---
title: "Which potential evapotranspiration input for a lumped rainfall-runoff model?"
author: "Oudin, L., Michel, C., Anctil, F."
publication: "Journal Of Hydrology"
year: 2005
categories: [Hydrological Model,Precipitation,Evapotranspiration]
doi: https://doi.org/10.1016/j.jhydrol.2004.08.025
---

## Abstract

NA

## Citation

Oudin, L., Michel, C., & Anctil, F. (2005). Which potential evapotranspiration input for a lumped rainfall-runoff model? Journal of Hydrology, 303(1–4), 275–289. https://doi.org/10.1016/j.jhydrol.2004.08.025
